cases.note: single Text node serializes and deserializes identically
single Button node keeps label and onTap action ref
single TextField node keeps value and onChange action ref
horizontal Stack with Text and Button children
List node with Text item children
nested vertical Stack of Text plus List plus Button
form-ish vertical Stack with TextField and submit Button
identical trees produce an empty patch list
single Text text change -> one update_text at [0]
single Button label change -> one update_prop at [0]
TextField value change -> one update_prop at [0]
Stack child appended -> insert at [2]
Stack child removed -> remove at [2]
subtree type change Text -> Button -> replace at [1]
List item appended -> insert at [2]
reordered unkeyed List assumes no move op; index diff emits two update_text patches
nested Button onTap change -> one update_prop at [1,0]
FutureWidget child must become fallback and round-trip without error
unknown prop sparkle:true on a known Button must not error
unknown FutureWidget nested inside List must survive fallback handling
